nasb.text: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron, as the vessels of the potter are broken to pieces, as I also have received authority from My Father;

esv.text: and he will rule  them with a rod of iron, as when earthen pots are broken in pieces, even as I myself have received authority from my Father.

cnv.text: 他必用鐵杖治理他們， 好像打碎陶器一樣粉碎他們， 好像我從父領受了權柄一樣；

ccb.text: 正如我从我父得到的权柄。他必用铁杖管辖列国，将他们如同陶器一般打得粉碎。

csbs.text: 他将用铁杖治理        列国， 如同打碎陶器那样      —— 就像我也从我父那里领受了权柄一样；
